profile.name: Sanat Sumeet Karkhanis
profile.bio: I am a Computer Engineering student (Major: Data Science) at Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology, D. Y. Patil Deemed to be University, Navi Mumbai. I specialize in building data-driven systems, full-stack web applications, and AI integrations. I am passionate about data analytics, machine learning, and system architecture, and I've worked as a Trainee Intern at ServiceIO Consultancy Services and participated in multiple hackathons, including being a NASA Space Apps Challenge local finalist.

services.title: Data Science & Analytics
services.description: Developing machine learning models and visual dashboards with Pandas, Scikit-learn, and Plotly.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Development
services.description: Building high-performance, real-time web applications using React, TypeScript, FastAPI, and WebSockets.

services.title: Database & System Design
services.description: Designing optimized SQL schemas, implementing Redis caching, and containerizing services with Docker.

services.title: AI & LLM Integrations
services.description: Developing RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) applications with LangChain, FAISS, and OpenAI APIs.

experience.summary: Worked on-site supporting consultancy operations and contributing to client-facing technology solutions.
highlights: Worked on-site supporting consultancy operations and contributing to client-facing technology solutions.

projects.title: TradeFlow
projects.subtitle: Fixed-Income Electronic Trading Simulator
projects.description: Simulated RFQ quote-competition workflows for fixed-income market-making, optimizing dealer execution under a 15-second response window with live liquidity and yield constraints. Tracked real-time execution KPIs and modeled counterparty settlement risk through interactive trading dashboards.

projects.title: AI Financial Research Assistant
projects.subtitle: RAG engine and dashboard for SEC filings and stock charts
projects.description: Built ETL pipelines using yFinance and SEC EDGAR APIs to store structured market data in PostgreSQL for automated financial reporting. Developed dashboards with financial ratios, SMA, RSI, MACD, and AI-powered investment summaries using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

projects.title: EmpathI
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Crowdfunding Platform
projects.description: Engineered data pipelines for 500+ campaigns with automated reporting and validation, achieving 90%+ fraud detection using LightGBM and XGBoost.

projects.title: Messier Deep Sky Navigator
projects.subtitle: Deep-zoom interactive sky catalog
projects.description: Processed 10,000+ astronomical image tiles into a coordinate-mapped interactive sky catalog with deep-zoom visualization. Shortlisted as a local finalist at the global NASA Space Apps Challenge hackathon.

education.school: Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology, D. Y. Patil Deemed to be University

highlights: Serve as Tech Lead for organizing national-level hackathons, coordinating end-to-end logistics, problem statements, and judging pipelines for 100+ participants.
Manage and maintain the chapter website; drive online event promotion and member engagement initiatives.

extracurricular.name: NASA Space Apps Challenge
highlights: Built Messier Deep Sky Navigator; shortlisted as local finalist at the global NASA hackathon.

extracurricular.name: Winternship Program – RAIT ACM SIGAI
highlights: Won 1st Place building MalariaCARE, an AI chatbot for malaria awareness and diagnosis support.

extracurricular.name: Gridlock Hackathon 2.0
highlights: Advanced to the Prototype Phase at a national-level hackathon for innovation and functional solution delivery.
